info.title: TALXIS CLI (txc
info.description: TALXIS CLI (txc) is a .NET global tool for developer automation and Power Platform scripting.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Tool for automating development loops in Power Platform

commands.name: data
commands.description: Data utilities for modeling, demostration, migration and integration

commands.name: transform
commands.description: Data-related utilities for ETL, Power Query and migration scenarios

commands.name: server
commands.description: HTTP server for ETL and data transformation tasks

commands.name: start
commands.description:
Starts a local HTTP server exposing endpoints for ETL/data transformation tasks. Useful for integrating with Power Query or other local ETL tools. 

Available endpoints:
  POST /ComputePrimaryKey — Accepts a JSON body with 'entity' and 'alternateKeys' to return a deterministic GUID primary key. 
    The 'alternateKeys' are a set of attributes that together uniquely identify a record and never change for its lifetime.

options.name: --port
options.description: Optional. Port to run the server on (default: 50505) [default: 50505]

commands.name: package
commands.description: Configuration migration tool (CMT) for moving data between different environments

commands.name: convert
commands.description: Convert tables from an XLSX file to CMT data package XML

options.name: --input
options.description: Path to the input XLSX file

options.name: --output
options.description: Path to the output XML file

commands.name: workspace
commands.description: Develop solutions in your local workspace

commands.name: component
commands.description: Create or modify components of your solution

commands.name: create
commands.description: Scaffolds a component from a template and passes parameters

options.name: --Output
options.description: Output path for the new component

options.name: --param
options.description: Component parameters which can be retrieved by parameter list command. Inputs need to be passed in the form key=value. Can be specified multiple times. [default: System.Collections.Generic.List`1[System.String]]

commands.name: list
commands.description: Lists parameters for a specific component

commands.name: explain
commands.description: Explains a solution component type. Use names returned by 'component type list' command

arguments.name: type
arguments.description: Type of the component to explain

commands.name: explain
commands.description: Provides a summary of repository structure, build system, project types, components, and how they are organized for development and deployment. Use this tool whenever the user asks about organizing or understanding the workspace. This includes details about the monorepo layout, use of .NET project and solution files, supported project types (such as Dataverse solutions, plugins, packages, Power Apps components, and custom code apps), and how projects are managed and built using MSBuild. The summary also explains how solution and package projects reference and compose other components for deployment, offering flexibility in organizing code for various scenarios.
